ascend_skill.desc:
Beachflower Minami has 3 kinds of Everyday Medicine.
When using medicine on allies, restore HP to the main target equal to 8% of Beachflower Minami's max HP.
When using Gentle Sea Breeze, grant 1 Midsummer Prescription stack (stacks up to 1 time). At the start of Beachflower Minami's turn, she can spend 1 Midsummer Prescription stack to gain Flower Basket Pharmacy.
Flower Basket Pharmacy: Use medicine without spending a turn, and extend the duration of Potent Medicine used by 1 turn. After using medicine 1 time, lose this effect.
ascend_skill.name: Seaside First Aid

ascend_skill.desc:
When using Gentle Sea Breeze, gain 1 more Midsummer Prescription stack. Midsummer Prescription now stacks up to 2 times (only 1 Midsummer Prescription stack can be used in a turn).
Increase the effects of medicine used by Beachflower Minami by 20%.
ascend_skill.name: Summertime Cure-all

ascend_skill.desc:
When using Beach Basket, inflict Perplexing Petals on the target.
Perplexing Petals: Decrease the target's Defense by 30%, and increase critical damage taken by 30% for 3 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Spellbinding Summer Scents

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Beach Basket and Gentle Sea Breeze by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Relaxing Breeze

ascend_skill.desc: Highlight Enhanced: Extend the duration of all buffs granted by Highlight to 3 turns. Also, when using medicine, increase medicine effects by 5%.
ascend_skill.name: Lingering Ripples of Summer

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Summer Garden and Thief Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: White Flowers Swaying

ascend_skill.desc:
When using any medicine, items are not spent upon use.
Extend the duration of Potent Medicine effects by 1 turn. Also, when using medicine on allies with Flower Basket Pharmacy, also grant Summertime Refresh to the main target.
Summertime Refresh: Increase final damage amplification by 15% for 1 turn.
ascend_skill.name: Angel in White

highlight_skill.desc: Increase 1 other ally's damage by 24.4%/26.9%/25.9%/28.4%, and increase critical damage by 16.66% of the potion of Beachflower Minami's critical multiplier over 100% (up to 213.4%/229.9%/229.9%/246.4% of critical multiplier). Lasts for 2 turns. Also, when Beachflower Minami uses medicine, increase medicine effects by 9.8%/10.8%/10.4%/11.4%.
highlight_skill.name: Highlight

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Bless damage to all foes equal to 64.4%/71.0%/68.4%/75.0% of Beachflower Minami's max HP, and inflict Bewitching Blossoms for 3 turns.
Bewitching Blossoms: When taking an attack, increase that damage's Attack by 9.8%/10.8%/10.4%/11.4% + 4% more for every 1200 of Beachflower Minami's max HP (up to 11712/12912/12432/13632 of max HP).
normal_skill.name: Beach Basket

normal_skill.desc: Increase party's damage by 7.8%/8.6%/8.3%/9.1% + 3.2% more for every 1200 of Beachflower Minami's max HP (up to 11712/12912/12432/13632 of max HP) for 3 turns. Also, grant all allies 1 Blessing stack, and remove 1 debuff.
normal_skill.name: Summer Garden

normal_skill.desc:
Increase 1 other ally's critical rate by 15.6%/17.2%/16.6%/18.2%, and increase critical damage by 33.33% of the portion of Beachflower Minami's critical multiplier over 100% (up to 213.4%/229.9%/229.9%/246.4% of critical multiplier). Lasts for 3 turns.
Passive: When using medicine on an ally, increase the main target's critical damage for 1 turn. This increase is equal to 16.66% of the portion of Beachflower Minami's critical multiplier over 100% (up to 213.4%/229.9%/229.9%/246.4% of critical multiplier).
normal_skill.name: Gentle Sea Breeze

passive_skill.desc:
Each time a skill is used on allies, grant 1 Blessing stack to targets.
When Beachflower Minami is present, for each Blessing stack on allies, increase their damage by 6.0% (up to 36.0%).
passive_skill.name: Soothing Sunlight

passive_skill.desc: When Beachflower Minami is present, increase allies' Attack by 12.0%, and for each type of buff granted by Potent Medicine, increase Attack by 15.0%.
passive_skill.name: Blossoms by the Beach
